requirements: The  Resume Parser System  should automatically extract and organize important information from resumes such as candidate name, contact details, education, skills, work experience, and certifications. The system should convert unstructured resume documents into structured data, enabling recruiters to quickly search, filter, and evaluate candidates, thereby improving the efficiency and accuracy of the recruitment process.

user_stories.title: Automate resume data extraction and organization
user_stories.goal: To efficiently and accurately extract and organize important information from resumes
user_stories.benefit: Improve recruitment process by enabling quick search, filter, and evaluation of candidates
acceptance_criteria: System extracts candidate name from resume
System extracts and organizes contact details
System extracts and organizes education information
System extracts and organizes skills from resumes
System extracts and organizes work experience from resumes
System extracts and organizes certifications from resumes

user_stories.title: Convert unstructured resume data into structured data
user_stories.goal: To convert unstructured resume data into structured data for easy search and filtering
user_stories.benefit: Improve recruitment process by enabling quick evaluation of candidates
acceptance_criteria: System converts unstructured resume data into structured data
Structured data includes candidate name, contact details, education, skills, work experience, and certifications

user_stories.title: Enable quick search, filter, and evaluation of candidates
user_stories.goal: To quickly search, filter, and evaluate candidates based on extracted and organized data
user_stories.benefit: Improve recruitment process by reducing time to find and evaluate potential candidates
acceptance_criteria: System allows recruiters to search resumes based on extracted data
System allows recruiters to filter resumes based on extracted data
System allows recruiters to evaluate candidates based on extracted data
